verses.latin_vulgate: In finem. Psalmus David.   Ad te, Domine, levavi animam meam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְדָוִ֡ד אֵלֶ֥יךָ יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה נַפְשִׁ֥י אֶשָּֽׂא׃
verses.king_james: Unto thee, O Lord, do I lift up my soul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus meus, in te confido ; non erubescam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱֽלֹהַ֗י בְּךָ֣ בָ֭טַחְתִּי אַל־אֵב֑וֹשָׁה אַל־יַעַלְצ֖וּ אוֹיְבַ֣י לִֽי׃
verses.king_james: O my God, I trust in thee: let me not be ashamed, let not mine enemies triumph over me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Neque irrideant me inimici mei :  etenim universi qui sustinent te, non confundentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּ֣ם כׇּל־קֹ֭וֶיךָ לֹ֣א יֵבֹ֑שׁוּ יֵ֝בֹ֗שׁוּ הַבּוֹגְדִ֥ים רֵיקָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Yea, let none that wait on thee be ashamed: let them be ashamed which transgress without cause.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confundantur omnes iniqua agentes supervacue.  Vias tuas, Domine, demonstra mihi,  et semitas tuas edoce me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דְּרָכֶ֣יךָ יְ֭הֹוָה הוֹדִיעֵ֑נִי אֹ֖רְחוֹתֶ֣יךָ לַמְּדֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Shew me thy ways, O Lord; teach me thy paths.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dirige me in veritate tua, et doce me,  quia tu es Deus salvator meus,  et te sustinui tota die.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַדְרִ֘יכֵ֤נִי בַאֲמִתֶּ֨ךָ ׀ וְֽלַמְּדֵ֗נִי כִּֽי־אַ֭תָּה אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׁעִ֑י אוֹתְךָ֥ קִ֝וִּ֗יתִי כׇּל־הַיּֽוֹם׃
verses.king_james: Lead me in thy truth, and teach me: for thou art the God of my salvation; on thee do I wait all the day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reminiscere miserationum tuarum, Domine,  et misericordiarum tuarum quæ a sæculo sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זְכֹר־רַחֲמֶ֣יךָ יְ֭הֹוָה וַחֲסָדֶ֑יךָ כִּ֖י מֵעוֹלָ֣ם הֵֽמָּה׃
verses.king_james: Remember, O Lord, thy tender mercies and thy lovingkindnesses; for they have been ever of old.

verses.latin_vulgate: Delicta juventutis meæ, et ignorantias meas, ne memineris.  Secundum misericordiam tuam memento mei tu,  propter bonitatem tuam, Domine.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חַטֹּ֤אות נְעוּרַ֨י ׀ וּפְשָׁעַ֗י אַל־תִּ֫זְכֹּ֥ר כְּחַסְדְּךָ֥ זְכׇר־לִי־אַ֑תָּה לְמַ֖עַן טוּבְךָ֣ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Remember not the sins of my youth, nor my transgressions: according to thy mercy remember thou me for thy goodness’ sake, O Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dulcis et rectus Dominus ;  propter hoc legem dabit delinquentibus in via.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טוֹב־וְיָשָׁ֥ר יְהֹוָ֑ה עַל־כֵּ֤ן יוֹרֶ֖ה חַטָּאִ֣ים בַּדָּֽרֶךְ׃
verses.king_james: Good and upright is the Lord: therefore will he teach sinners in the way.

verses.latin_vulgate: Diriget mansuetos in judicio ;  docebit mites vias suas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַדְרֵ֣ךְ עֲ֭נָוִים בַּמִּשְׁפָּ֑ט וִילַמֵּ֖ד עֲנָוִ֣ים דַּרְכּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The meek will he guide in judgment: and the meek will he teach his way.

verses.latin_vulgate: Universæ viæ Domini, misericordia et veritas,  requirentibus testamentum ejus et testimonia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־אׇרְח֣וֹת יְ֭הֹוָה חֶ֣סֶד וֶאֱמֶ֑ת לְנֹצְרֵ֥י בְ֝רִית֗וֹ וְעֵדֹתָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: All the paths of the Lord are mercy and truth unto such as keep his covenant and his testimonies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter nomen tuum, Domine,  propitiaberis peccato meo ; multum est enim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַֽעַן־שִׁמְךָ֥ יְהֹוָ֑ה וְֽסָלַחְתָּ֥ לַ֝עֲוֺנִ֗י כִּ֣י רַב־הֽוּא׃
verses.king_james: For thy name’s sake, O Lord, pardon mine iniquity; for it is great.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis est homo qui timet Dominum ?  legem statuit ei in via quam elegit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִי־זֶ֣ה הָ֭אִישׁ יְרֵ֣א יְהֹוָ֑ה י֝וֹרֶ֗נּוּ בְּדֶ֣רֶךְ יִבְחָֽר׃
verses.king_james: What man is he that feareth the Lord? him shall he teach in the way that he shall choose.

verses.latin_vulgate: Anima ejus in bonis demorabitur,  et semen ejus hæreditabit terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַ֭פְשׁוֹ בְּט֣וֹב תָּלִ֑ין וְ֝זַרְע֗וֹ יִ֣ירַשׁ אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: His soul shall dwell at ease; and his seed shall inherit the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Firmamentum est Dominus timentibus eum ;  et testamentum ipsius ut manifestetur illis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ס֣וֹד יְ֭הֹוָה לִירֵאָ֑יו וּ֝בְרִית֗וֹ לְהוֹדִיעָֽם׃
verses.king_james: The secret of the Lord is with them that fear him; and he will shew them his covenant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Oculi mei semper ad Dominum,  quoniam ipse evellet de laqueo pedes meos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵינַ֣י תָּ֭מִיד אֶל־יְהֹוָ֑ה כִּ֤י הֽוּא־יוֹצִ֖יא מֵרֶ֣שֶׁת רַגְלָֽי׃
verses.king_james: Mine eyes are ever toward the Lord; for he shall pluck my feet out of the net.

verses.latin_vulgate: Respice in me, et miserere mei,  quia unicus et pauper sum ego.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פְּנֵֽה־אֵלַ֥י וְחׇנֵּ֑נִי כִּֽי־יָחִ֖יד וְעָנִ֣י אָֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Turn thee unto me, and have mercy upon me; for I am desolate and afflicted.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tribulationes cordis mei multiplicatæ sunt :  de necessitatibus meis erue me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צָר֣וֹת לְבָבִ֣י הִרְחִ֑יבוּ מִ֝מְּצוּקוֹתַ֗י הוֹצִיאֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: The troubles of my heart are enlarged: O bring thou me out of my distresses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vide humilitatem meam et laborem meum,  et dimitte universa delicta mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רְאֵ֣ה עׇ֭נְיִי וַעֲמָלִ֑י וְ֝שָׂ֗א לְכׇל־חַטֹּאותָֽי׃
verses.king_james: Look upon mine affliction and my pain; and forgive all my sins.

verses.latin_vulgate: Respice inimicos meos, quoniam multiplicati sunt,  et odio iniquo oderunt me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רְאֵֽה־אֹיְבַ֥י כִּי־רָ֑בּוּ וְשִׂנְאַ֖ת חָמָ֣ס שְׂנֵאֽוּנִי׃
verses.king_james: Consider mine enemies; for they are many; and they hate me with cruel hatred.

verses.latin_vulgate: Custodi animam meam, et erue me :  non erubescam, quoniam speravi in te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שׇׁמְרָ֣ה נַ֭פְשִׁי וְהַצִּילֵ֑נִי אַל־אֵ֝ב֗וֹשׁ כִּֽי־חָסִ֥יתִי בָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: O keep my soul, and deliver me: let me not be ashamed; for I put my trust in thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Innocentes et recti adhæserunt mihi,  quia sustinui te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תֹּם־וָיֹ֥שֶׁר יִצְּר֑וּנִי כִּ֝֗י קִוִּיתִֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Let integrity and uprightness preserve me; for I wait on thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Libera, Deus, Israël  ex omnibus tribulationibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פְּדֵ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל מִ֝כֹּ֗ל צָרוֹתָֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Redeem Israel, O God, out of all his troubles.
